criteria.description: I-1: the spec-kitty doctor CLI surface (16 subcommand names, per-subcommand flags/arity, per-subcommand --help, exit codes) stays byte-identical across the decomposition.
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/test_doctor_cli_surface_golden.py (38 passed) — green at HEAD and re-run after every extraction WP.
criteria.notes: Golden harness pins names by set-equality, param arity, --help snapshots, and the 3 load-bearing names (skills/restart-daemon/sparse-checkout).

criteria.description: I-3: a single console / guard home — exactly one Console() instance backs the whole doctor surface (no per-module Console()).
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/test_doctor_shared.py — single-Console identity asserted across import sites; git grep 'Console()' shows one instantiation in the doctor cluster (_profile_health_render).

criteria.description: I-4: every function in the decomposed doctor surface is <=15 cyclomatic complexity (no C901 findings, no suppressions).
criteria.evidence: ruff check --select C901 src/specify_cli/cli/commands/ — All checks passed. The skills/identity/sparse-checkout/drift/mission-state mega-functions and state_roots were decomposed; the mission-state C901 suppression was dropped.
criteria.notes: Zero new suppressions across all 10 modules.

criteria.description: I-5 / FR-006: the test-facing private symbols (app, SlashCommandGap + 14 helpers) re-export from the doctor shim so the 58 doctor test files keep resolving.
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/test_doctor_shim_reexports.py + full doctor suite (428 passed) — all contracted imports resolve from specify_cli.cli.commands.doctor.
criteria.notes: Re-validated against git grep 'from specify_cli.cli.commands.doctor import' in WP11.

criteria.description: I-6 / H2: merge.path_is_under_worktrees import stays function-local; no doctor<->merge module-load cycle.
criteria.evidence: tests/specify_cli/cli/commands/test_coordination_doctor.py — AST 'not module-level' test + import-cycle regression test; the import is indented inside _check_tracked_worktrees_content.
criteria.notes: import specify_cli.cli.commands.doctor; import specify_cli.cli.commands.merge runs clean.

criteria.description: I-7: the compat safety predicates + __init__ argv fast-paths still fire (keyed on the byte-preserved doctor skills / restart-daemon / sparse-checkout names).
criteria.evidence: tests/cli_gate/test_doctor_modes.py + tests/cli_gate/test_safe_commands.py (50 passed) + the restart-daemon argv fast-path test in test_doctor_restart_daemon.py.
criteria.notes: Subcommand names owned by the @app.command shells; unchanged.

criteria.description: FR-003/FR-004: behavior-preserving extraction — exit-code contracts of all 16 subcommands unchanged; per-sibling coverage >=90%; ruff + mypy --strict clean.
criteria.evidence: full doctor suite 428 passed; per-sibling focused tests >=90% (doctor_shared 100%, doctrine_collect 92%, identity_audit 99%, command_surface 90%, mission_state 95%, coordination 91%, sparse_checkout 98%, workspace_husk 100%, daemon 100%); ruff + mypy --strict clean on all 10 modules.

criteria.description: #1623: the doctrine-health MODEL/RENDER/COLLECT triad is completed — the collectors #1623 left in doctor.py moved to _doctrine_collect (in-mission verdict reached).
criteria.evidence: WP03 _doctrine_collect.py + the byte-pinned doctrine-selections snapshot (test_doctor_doctrine_selections_snapshot) green; issue-matrix #1623 verdict in-mission -> satisfied.

negative_invariants.description: I-6/H2: no module-level import of the merge module in _coordination_doctor (would reintroduce the doctor<->merge cycle).
No new blanket lint/type suppressions introduced to pass the gates; the pre-existing mission-state C901 suppression was removed.
